channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: JPMorgan notches record quarter as CEO Jamie Dimon calls the banking environment 'close to as good as it gets' - Yahoo Finance
item.description:
1. JPMorgan notches record quarter as CEO Jamie Dimon calls the banking environment 'close to as good as it gets'  Yahoo Finance
  2. JPMorgan notches the highest quarterly profit in US banking history  Yahoo Finance
  3. ‘Close to as good as it gets’: Jamie Dimon just offered another warning on the bubbly markets as Wall Street had a monster quarter  Fortune
  4. Bullish charts and fundamentals are lining up for JPMorgan Chase, says Frank Cappelleri  CNBC
  5. JPMorgan Chase, Stock Of The Day, Rises In Buy Zone: Next AI Winner?  Investor's Business Daily

item.title: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline - CNBC
item.description:
1. Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline  CNBC
  2. Inflation Slowed to 3.5% in June, as Americans Got a Break From Gasoline Prices  WSJ
  3. Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq slip as semiconductor stocks plummet  Yahoo Finance
  4. US PPI: Producer Prices Rise at Slower Pace as Core Gauge Decelerates  Bloomberg.com
  5. White House Cheers Inflation Data While Iran War Sparks New Price Surge  The New York Times
